mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.real_name as user_name FROM check_task_assignments t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.daily_check_id = #{dailyCheckId} ORDER BY t.created_at

SELECT t.*, u.real_name as user_name, dc.check_name, dc.check_date, p.plan_name FROM check_task_assignments t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN daily_checks dc ON t.daily_check_id = dc.id LEFT JOIN check_plans p ON t.plan_id = p.id WHERE t.daily_check_id = #{dailyCheckId} AND t.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_task_assignments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
